texts.orig: The interpreter was validated using manual testing and supplemented by an external test suite.
texts.text: The interpreter was validated using manual testing and supplemented by an external test suite.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Manual tests were the bread and butter during development:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Running the interpreter with these custom inputs:
texts.text: Running the interpreter with these custom inputs:

texts.label: code
texts.orig:
php8.4 interpret.php --source=my_test.xml --input=my_input.txt > my_output.txt
echo $? # Check return code
# Manually inspect my_output.txt and stderr
texts.text:

echo $? # Check return code
# Manually inspect my_output.txt and stderr

texts.orig: Using Xdebug [5] as a PHP Debug VSCode extension to inspect internal state (
texts.text: Using Xdebug [5] as a PHP Debug VSCode extension to inspect internal state (

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In addition to manual tests, the interpreter was extensively validated using an external test suite developed by fellow student Kubikuli [2]. This suite provides a comprehensive set of tests covering various aspects of the SOL25 language, including syntax, semantics, built-in functions, and error conditions.
texts.text: In addition to manual tests, the interpreter was extensively validated using an external test suite developed by fellow student Kubikuli [2]. This suite provides a comprehensive set of tests covering various aspects of the SOL25 language, including syntax, semantics, built-in functions, and error conditions.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The tests were executed using the provided scripts within the test suite repository, comparing the interpreter's output and return codes against expected results. This automated approach significantly improved test coverage and helped identify subtle bugs and regressions during development.
texts.text: The tests were executed using the provided scripts within the test suite repository, comparing the interpreter's output and return codes against expected results. This automated approach significantly improved test coverage and helped identify subtle bugs and regressions during development.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Per academic integrity requirements, AI tools (primarily GitHub Copilot [3] and Google Gemini [4]) were used during the development of this project.
texts.text: Per academic integrity requirements, AI tools (primarily GitHub Copilot [3] and Google Gemini [4]) were used during the development of this project.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Nevertheless, the essential logic, key architectural decisions, OOP design and specifically the code handling message sending logic, expression evaluation, environment and frame management, were all manually implemented, reviewed, and validated.
texts.text: Nevertheless, the essential logic, key architectural decisions, OOP design and specifically the code handling message sending logic, expression evaluation, environment and frame management, were all manually implemented, reviewed, and validated.
